commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=24ba9891c6c03d1239a4647ca3ce164d40c24ada)
commands.review_summary:
The PR widens Telegram text delivery to return `undefined` for empty-text and HTML-whitespace sends and adds a colocated unit test for those skip paths. PR surface: Source +21, Tests +141. Total +162 across 2 files. Reproducibility: yes. source inspection shows current main attempts `sendMessage` for non-empty HTML such as `
` with `plainText: ""` and throws Telegram's empty-text 400 because there is no fallback. This review did not perform a live Telegram round trip.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor or maintainer follow-up for delivery-state accounting plus real Telegram proof; the proof gate keeps this out of the automated repair lane.

target.title: fix(telegram): silently skip empty-text and HTML-whitespace sends
target.body:
Supersedes #59725. The original PR was auto-closed on 2026-04-02 by openclaw-barnacle for the 10-open-PR cap. Reopening it programmatically fails because the close `stateReason` is `COMPLETED` plus the branch was force-pushed since, so this is a fresh PR carrying the rebased fix. ## Behavior addressed Interrupted mid-reply turns can stream bare `
`, `
`, `
`, or ` ` chunks. The Telegram Bot API rejects these with HTTP 400 (`message text is empty` legacy, `text must be non-empty` newer wording). Previously this surfaced as a user-visible delivery failure; this PR silently skips the send instead. ## Change One commit (`24ba9891c6`) touches `extensions/telegram/src/bot/delivery.send.ts` plus a new colocated test. - `sendTelegramText` return type widened to `Promise`. Both call sites in `delivery.replies.ts` already handle `undefined` via `if (firstDeliveredMessageId == null)`. - Pre-flight branch: when formatted HTML trims to empty AND `plainText` trims to empty, log via `logVerbose` and return `undefined`. - Post-call branch: when Telegram replies with the empty-text 400 AND there is no plain fallback, log via `logVerbose` and return `undefined`. - `EMPTY_TEXT_ERR_RE` now matches both `message text is empty` and `text must be non-empty`. - All other Telegram client rejections still throw unchanged. Non-empty payloads still deliver via the existing markdown / plain-fallback pipeline. ## Real behavior proof **Behavior addressed:** Telegram delivery layer raises a hard 400 failure when interrupted mid-reply turns stream bare `
`, `
`, `
`, or ` ` chunks that Telegram strips to empty server-side and returns either the "message text is empty" or "text must be non-empty" 400 description. **Real environment tested:** Live OpenClaw gateway on rh-bot.lan, pid 65734, build SHA 23804e610c (upgrade-v2026.5.28 with this PR cherry-picked). The fix is deployed and active. Verification driver imports the deployed `extensions/telegram/src/bot/delivery.send.ts` directly from the gateway's working tree via the `tsx` runtime so the exact code the gateway executes is exercised. **Exact steps or command run after this patch:** ``` ssh alexm@rh-bot.lan 'cd /Users/alexm/.openclaw/openclaw && node_modules/.bin/tsx /tmp/proof-empty-text.mts' ``` **Evidence after fix:** ``` host: rh-bot.lan gateway-pid: 65734 build-SHA: 23804e610c (upgrade-v2026.5.28) node-version: 25.8.2 --- PASS pre-flight skip both empty | calls=0 result=undefined PASS bare
chunk + empty plain | calls=1 result=undefined PASS self-closing
| calls=1 result=undefined PASS spaced
| calls=1 result=undefined PASS nbsp-only | calls=1 result=undefined PASS multiple nbsp | calls=1 result=undefined PASS new wording | calls=1 result=undefined PASS unrelated 400 still throws | calls=1 result=throw:400: Bad Request: chat not found PASS well-formed payload still delivers | calls=1 result=9999 --- result: 9 pass / 0 fail ``` **Observed result after fix:** The pre-flight whitespace-only payload short-circuits with zero API calls (calls=0). Each of the six HTML-stripped-to-empty payloads (bare `
`, `
`, `
`, ` `, `   `, ``) makes exactly one API call (calls=1), the documented 400 wording is caught, and the silent skip fires returning `undefined`. The newer `text must be non-empty` wording is caught alongside the legacy `message text is empty` wording. Unrelated 400 errors such as "chat not found" still throw to the caller (calls=1 result=throw). Well-formed payloads still deliver with a real message_id (calls=1 result=9999). **What was not tested:** Live Telegram round-trip with a real bot token sending the malformed payloads to a real chat. The production deployment proves the deployed bundle exposes the new code paths with the correct contract and the gateway is up and running normally on the new build.
target.author: amittell

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
